mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM jq_sys_menu m INNER JOIN jq_sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN jq_sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort_no, m.id

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM jq_sys_menu m INNER JOIN jq_sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN jq_sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort_no, m.id
SELECT * FROM jq_sys_menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id, sort_no, id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM jq_sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{menuId} AND is_deleted = 0
